title: Soul Judge
description: This mod adds a unique 3D sword that, when right-clicked, randomly gives the player both buffs and debuffs for 10 seconds. Perfect for chaotic gameplay and unpredictable combat!
body:
# 🗡️ Chaos Blade – Random Effects Sword

This mod adds a unique 3D sword that makes every battle unpredictable.

## ⚙️ Features:

On right-click, the sword applies random buffs and debuffs to the player

Effects last for 10 seconds

Perfect for chaotic PvP, minigames, or fun survival

Includes a custom 3D model that makes the weapon stand out


_Each use is a gamble — will you become stronger or weaker? Let the Chaos Blade decide._

## 🔧 About the Project

This is my first mod project, and I’ve put a lot of effort into it.
I plan to create even bigger and better mods in the future — stay tuned!
